Personal Services Contracting Pilot Program, , , as amended by , , ; , , ; , , ; , , , authorized the Director of the International Broadcasting Bureau to establish a pilot program for the purpose of hiring United States citizens or aliens as personal services contractors for service in the United States as broadcasters and other broadcasting specialists in the International Broadcasting Bureau, and provided that such authority would terminate on . children.text: shall, except as otherwise provided in this Act, have the sole responsibility to operate their respective grantees within the jurisdiction of their respective States of incorporation;
shall be composed of not fewer than 5 members, who shall be qualified individuals who are not employed in the public sector; and
shall appoint successors in the event of vacancies on their respective boards, in accordance with applicable bylaws.

children.heading: Not Federal employees
children.label: b Not Federal employees
children.text: No employee of any grantee under this chapter may be a Federal employee.
